productDisplayName: Spykar Men Range Solid Black Shirts
description: Composition Black shirt made of 100% cotton, with full hand sleeves, front buttoned placket with snap buttons and concealed placket till mid chest, tipped collar, brand name and lettering printed on left chest in black and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Stylish to the hilt, this black shirt from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
